name_en: Mini Puzzle geometric bag 👄L New model puzzle mini👉Mini No.10173, the most sought-after bag of 2019 ✔️ Same style as Mengwei Qiwei He Sui... Loewe latest model uses imported calfskin, German imported Saffiano thread, YKK custom hardware. Don't let it be mini, it's super spacious, can hold plus size lipstick and powder with no pressure. Suitable for petite cute girls, also suitable for tall fairies. Size: 18×12.5×8cm [Comes with counter packaging]
